caption: The video begins with a clean, white screen featuring the colorful "IDEASBOX" logo prominently displayed in the center. The letters are individually colored in orange, red, green, blue, and gray, creating a vibrant and eye-catching design. This initial frame sets a professional yet creative tone for the content that follows. The scene then transitions to another white screen, this time showcasing various logos and text indicating support from different organizations. At the top, the text reads "With the support of," followed by the "AS Foundation" logo on the left side. To the right, the "Association Pierre Bellon" logo is displayed, along with its tagline "Agir pour le développement humain." Below these, the "Mairie de Paris" logo is shown, and further down, the emblem of the "République Française Ministère des Affaires Étrangères" is visible. This sequence of frames highlights the collaborative effort and backing from multiple entities, suggesting a project or initiative focused on human development and supported by both private foundations and government bodies.
